ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sports_competitions" (
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competition */,
  "competition_name" TEXT /* Name of the competition */,
  "sport_type" TEXT /* Type of sport */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the competition */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the competition */,
  "competition_format" TEXT /* Format of the competition */,
  "competition_level" TEXT /* Level of the competition */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the competition details were created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the competition details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("competition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_short_name" TEXT /* Short name or abbreviation for the team */,
  "sport_type" TEXT /* Type of sport the team plays */,
  "home_city" TEXT /* Home city of the team */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the team's logo */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team details were created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition in which the match was played */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date when the match was played */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the match was played */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match */,
  "match_result" TEXT /* Result of the match */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance figure for the match */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the match details were created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the match details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES sports_competitions ("competition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_performances" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team's performance */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match in which the performance was recorded */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score achieved by the team in the match */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins in the match */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses in the match */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Number of draws in the match */,
  "performance_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the team's performance */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance details were created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performances_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performances_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Start year of the season */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* End year of the season */,
  "season_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the season */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the season details were created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the season details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_seasons" (
  "team_season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team-season association */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "team_position" INTEGER /* Team's position in the season standings */,
  "points_earned" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the team in the season */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team-season association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team-season association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_seasons_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_seasons_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role details were created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user details were created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the data was accessed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team's statistics */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "total_wins" INTEGER /* Total number of wins */,
  "total_losses" INTEGER /* Total number of losses */,
  "total_draws" INTEGER /* Total number of draws */,
  "average_score" REAL /* Average score achieved */,
  "statistic_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the team's statistics */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statistic details were created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statistic details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_performance" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match in which the performance was recorded */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "player_position" TEXT /* Position of the player on the field */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored in the match */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists in the match */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received in the match */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received in the match */,
  "player_minutes_played" INTEGER /* Number of minutes the player played in the match */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player performance details were created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player performance details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
